variables.clothing_signature: smart casual — shirt with rolled sleeves, wrist watch, bracelet

anatomic_anchor.face_shape: round-oval, friendly soft contours, no sharp angles

eyes.color: warm hazel with golden green flecks
eyes.eyelids: double eyelids, visible crease, eyes crinkle when smiling
eyes.eyebrows: medium thickness, soft natural arch, light brown, well-groomed

anatomic_anchor.nose: straight, medium length, rounded friendly tip, slightly upturned
anatomic_anchor.lips: medium full, naturally pink, wide smile showing teeth, laugh lines visible
anatomic_anchor.jaw: soft rounded jaw, no sharp angles, slight double chin when laughing
anatomic_anchor.skin_texture: smooth, healthy glow, minimal pores, clean shaven or very light stubble
distinguishing_features: wide genuine smile with visible laugh lines
eyes crinkle at corners when happy
slightly asymmetrical ears (left ear sits lower)
anatomic_anchor.visual_signature: round-oval face, warm hazel eyes, friendly smile, straight rounded nose, soft jaw, light brown hair, sporty fit build, smart casual with watch and bracelet
